query:
-- Check Sparrow Group services
SELECT COUNT(*) as totalServices, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyRevenue > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as withRevenue,
  SUM(monthlyRevenue) as totalRevenue,
  SUM(monthlyCost) as totalCost
FROM services
WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0222'
  AND (status IS NULL OR status != 'terminated');

-- Check customer record
SELECT externalId, name, monthlyCost FROM customers WHERE externalId = 'C0222';

-- Also check the unmatched SasBoss services that have pricebook-matchable names but weren't caught
-- e.g. "Standard Support NBN 50/20" (Mooloolaba Osteopathy)
SELECT externalId, planName, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue,
  (SELECT name FROM customers WHERE externalId = s.customerExternalId) as customerName
FROM services s
WHERE provider = 'SasBoss'
  AND monthlyRevenue = 0
  AND (status IS NULL OR status != 'terminated')
  AND customerExternalId IS NOT NULL AND customerExternalId != ''
  AND (planName LIKE '%Standard Support NBN%' OR planName LIKE '%NBN 50-20%' OR planName LIKE '%NBN 100-40%');
